checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue 127 closes the apply-mode pilot loop with a full 6-operation dry-run test. Adds issue-to-merge-github-full-loop-dry-run CLI test verifying dry_run=true, github_calls_performed=false, 6 operations, 6 connector actions.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: New CLI test passes. Issue-125 evidence updated with github_ci_passed true. Issue-125 scope marked completed. CURRENT_GOAL.md and README.md updated. All validators pass.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: No apply-mode GitHub mutations in this issue. Full-loop test is dry-run only. No secrets, production, billing, auth, database, CI/CD security, or deployment files changed.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: All changed files within declared scope. No protected paths touched.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: All validators passed locally including new full-loop-dry-run CLI test. Test verifies 6 operations, 6 connector actions, dry_run=true, github_calls_performed=false.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub CI is pending for the issue 127 PR and remains an external merge gate. Final report marks CI as not_collected.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: Final report accurately records local completion pending PR CI. Notes that issue 126 PR is also pending CI at time of branching.

findings.evidence: PR, CI, and merge for issue 127 are pending external GitHub gates. Issue 126 PR also pending.
findings.recommendation: Wait for CI on both PRs, merge in order (126 then 127). After both merge, the apply-mode pilot (issue_close + pr_open + merge) is complete.

unresolved_risks: GitHub CI and PR merge pending for issue 127 branch.
Issue 126 PR (129) pending CI at time of issue 127 branching.
